claims.name: Stated-steering phase1 baseline rating
claims.statement: In the phase-1 stated-preference steering experiment (n=200, Feb 2026, subsequently superseded), the unsteered baseline rating was 3.64 on the 1-5 preference scale.
claims.source: manual: stated-steering phase 1 (superseded a/b template); see paper/TODO_producers.md

claims.name: Stated-steering phase1 negative range
claims.statement: At c=-10% of the mean activation norm, stated-preference rating falls to 3.27-3.36 across position arms (phase-1 experiment).
claims.source: manual: stated-steering phase 1 (superseded a/b template); see paper/TODO_producers.md

claims.name: Stated-steering phase1 positive range
claims.statement: At c=+10% of the mean activation norm, stated-preference rating rises to 4.60-4.61 across position arms (phase-1 experiment).
claims.source: manual: stated-steering phase 1 (superseded a/b template); see paper/TODO_producers.md

claims.name: Abstract targeted tasks r approximation
claims.statement: Abstract shorthand for the Gemma-3-27B preference-probe correlation with behavioural deltas on targeted tasks across the induced-shift, conflict/opposing, and biography-injection experiments in §4.1 and App.~C. The underlying values range from ~0.83 (Qwen simple-target) to 0.95 (Gemma simple-target).
claims.source: manual: cross-experiment abstract approximation; refine by replacing with a derived range from the registered per-experiment targeted-r claims
